expectations.text: Explains disappeared as a missing task slot rather than a simple exit result
expectations.evidence: Describes the event as the previously observed background task slot no longer being present.

expectations.text: Lists plausible causes such as kill, replace, or session/task removal
expectations.evidence: Covers intended stop, replace, rerun without reuse, session rebuild, and manual removal.

expectations.text: Explains how to judge whether the disappearance was expected
expectations.evidence: Says to check whether the task still exists under another identity and whether it should have persisted.

expectations.text: Makes the higher-level task meaning clear even if low-level window mechanics are mentioned
expectations.evidence: Frames it first as a background task slot disappearing, then clarifies the underlying window-level implementation detail.
